name: govee-led-ble-card
description: Lovelace custom card for the ha_govee_led_ble integration (segment painter). Bundles vendored lit; HA runtime stays dependency-free.

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && bun build src/govee-led-ble-card.ts --outfile dist/govee-led-ble-card.js --minify --format esm --target browser
